notes: TeamCity log format with ##teamcity[...] service messages; .NET/xUnit test framework. Adversarial red-herring spam: Namespace.Tests.LegacyClientTests passes but emits 180 lines of 'WARNING: method X is deprecated' to stdout, flooding the log with WARNING keywords. The actual failure is Namespace.Tests.PaymentProcessorTests.ProcessRefund with an assertion error 200 lines later. Tests noise filtering and correct identification of the authoritative failure despite keyword-heavy decoys. Synthetic fixture; no customer data. Generated case.
